*355 brands total* (+0 today)
96.9% have complete profiles (description + image) · 0 zero-content brands · 179 brands with website URLs audited

*:warning: Suspicious — Third-party (1)*
• `暖木家居 Warmwood Living` (`warmwood-living`) → <https://www.threads.net/@warmwood.living|threads.net/@warmwood.living>
  _Threads social media profile — not the brand's own website. Should point to brand's owned domain._

*Unknown / Unverified (88)*
Domains appear legitimate (`.com.tw` / `.tw` / `.com`) but could not be confirmed reachable via web search — typical for small/niche Taiwan brands with low search footprint. No evidence of broken domains detected.
_Heads-up: `BoingBoing` uses `http://www.boing.com.tw` (plain HTTP, no HTTPS) — consider updating the record._

*:white_check_mark: OK (~90 confirmed)*
Confirmed reachable via web search — includes 1973 Furniture, 2Angels, AROMASE, Djulis, Ecopeco, EYEGLAD, HIPPORIZZ, JUN616XTEEN, MOLA, MTSK, MXM, Pato Pato, PERi, Robber 925 Silver, SATBAKHI, SOLIS, Washcan, WEAVISM, ZALY, ZILA, and more.
